entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Madrid 2025 - Mar 21, 2025
entry.content: Looking forward to meeting you then.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Madrid 2025 - Mar 21, 2025
entry.content: We will also livestream the event 🤞.... you can check out the different times here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2zNL146thBrORy076Jg33K2fyfq25is3

entry.title: Re: Coming Up: Change in Preparation Plan for C_S4CFI
entry.content:
Hello Dear Doris. 

Why didn’t SAP announce this earlier? We have spent six months preparing for this certification, and now, with only 20 days left, it is impossible to adjust and prepare for a completely new exam format.

Would it be possible to extend the current exam structure until the end of April atleast? This would give candidates a fair chance to complete the certification under the format they have been preparing for.

Especially here in Germany, even for something as simple as inviting someone to a gathering, people check and confirm availability three months in advance. It is very surprising that such a significant change in a professional certification exam is being communicated with only 20 days’ notice.

entry.title: Re: ME_CUST_PO Enhancement : PO Amount Check Against PR
entry.content: Hi Raymond , the problem is we are trying to fetch real time data in ME21N while creating and ME22n while editing the PO so that we get a real time check whenever we are exceeding the PR amount , before saving ,so now the problem is EKPO table wont have the data because its not yet saved , and we need real time validation , here is the code that i am trying

entry.title: Re: ME_CUST_PO Enhancement : PO Amount Check Against PR
entry.content:
this is the code that i am trying

METHOD if_ex_me_process_po_cust~process_item.

DATA:
lt_eban TYPE TABLE OF eban, " PR Data from DB
lt_po_items TYPE TABLE OF mepoitem, " PO Items (Real-time)
lv_total_po_value TYPE p DECIMALS 2, " Total PO value for PR
lv_pr_total TYPE p DECIMALS 2, " Total PR value
ls_po_item TYPE mepoitem, " Current PO item
lo_header TYPE REF TO if_purchase_order_mm,
lt_items_ref TYPE REF TO mepoitems, " ✅ FIX: Use correct type
lv_ebeln TYPE ebeln. " PO number

FIELD-SYMBOLS:
<fs_items> TYPE TABLE OF mepoitem, " ✅ FIX: Define correct table type
<fs_item> TYPE mepoitem,
<fs_eban> TYPE eban.

" 1. Get current PO item data (Real-time)
ls_po_item = im_item->get_data( ).

" 2. Exit if no PR reference exists
IF ls_po_item-banfn IS INITIAL OR ls_po_item-bnfpo IS INITIAL.
RETURN.
ENDIF.

" 3. Get PO Header (Real-time PO Data)
lo_header = im_header. " ✅ FIXED: Use `im_header` instead of `lo_header`

" 4. Get all items in this PO (real-time)
lt_items_ref = im_header->get_items( ).
ASSIGN lt_items_ref->* TO <fs_items>.

IF sy-subrc = 0.
" Convert generic table to typed table
lt_po_items = CORRESPONDING #( <fs_items> ).
ELSE.
RETURN.
ENDIF.

" 5. Calculate total PO value for this PR (Before Save)
CLEAR lv_total_po_value.
LOOP AT lt_po_items ASSIGNING <fs_item> WHERE banfn = ls_po_item-banfn.
lv_total_po_value = lv_total_po_value + ( <fs_item>-netpr * <fs_item>-menge ).
ENDLOOP.

" 6. Fetch PR data from EBAN (DB Query)
SELECT * FROM eban INTO TABLE lt_eban
WHERE banfn = @LS_po_item-banfn.

IF sy-subrc <> 0.
MESSAGE e001(zpo_check) WITH 'PR data not found' TYPE 'E'.
RETURN.
ENDIF.

" 7. Calculate PR total value
CLEAR lv_pr_total.
LOOP AT lt_eban ASSIGNING <fs_eban>.
lv_pr_total = lv_pr_total + ( <fs_eban>-preis * <fs_eban>-menge ).
ENDLOOP.

" 8. Validate PO total vs PR total
IF lv_total_po_value > lv_pr_total.
MESSAGE e003(zpo_check) WITH ls_po_item-banfn TYPE 'E'. " Error: PO exceeds PR
ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: Re: MDK Filter Action and QuerySpecifier quotes
entry.content:
Hi @kevinbraun

DiplayValue expects a string: https://help.sap.com/doc/3642933ef2e1478fb1578ef2acba4ae9/Latest/en-US/reference/schemadoc/definitions/QuerySpecifier.schema.html#displayvalue

Have you attempted to provide a property without a space? Properties (or field names) containing spaces are generally not permitted, especially when constructing strings or queries (such as OData queries). I suggest surrounding the string with single quotes, like this: 'HOT SHOT' similar to how you have done in the ReturnValue or using a property name devoid of space.

Thank you.

It was resolved on its own. Not sure if I just needed to give it some time for the back-end configurations to get completed. Or maybe there were product experts who came across my post and got it sorted out. highly unlikely since they wouldnt have known which Global account I was talking about.

entry.title: Unable to update API Error while applying SuccessFactors OAuth connection API Management policy
entry.content:
Hey Peeps!

What am I trying to do - 

I am trying to set up SuccessFactors OAuth connection API Management policy for a Compound Employee SOAP call so that I don't need to configure any authentication credentials in Cloud Integration. 

 

What have I done till now -

- I copied over the 'SuccessFactors_OAuth2SAMLAssertion' policy template from 'Connect to SAP SuccessFactors' policy package from the Integration Suite Discover portal

 

- I copied the 'Compound Employee API' API from the 'SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central' package from the Integration Suite Discover portal

 - I configured the correct SuccessFactors API server URL, host alias, gave it a custom base path, etc.

- I applied the 'SuccessFactors_OAuth2SAMLAssertion' policy template. It automatically created the 8 policies under the Target Endpoint - Preflow.

 

- I configured the SF User ID, Client ID, Company ID, Authentication Token url and the private key. All this was created from the SuccessFactors Employee central - Manage OAuth Applications transaction

- When I hit update and save the API proxy I get the below error - Unable to update API - An internal error occurred, contact SAP Administrator for Detail

 

The weirdest part is that, I followed the same steps to set up an OData API proxy to SuccessFactors and it works like a charm. I tested it out successfully. 

What do you guys think the issue is? 

Kriba


 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Edit 1: (08-03-2025)

This error is not particular to the Authentication policy. I am getting this error no matter which policy I add - message logging, basic authentication, even a dummy java script with no code. 

 

 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Edit 2: (08-03-2025)

I have a sneaky suspicion that this is an error that's happening when copying the CompundEMployee API from the Discover portal. See the below when I copy an odata from the discover portal. When I try to edit the APIs in the API designer, I see all the different entities on the left.  

But when I try to check the compound employee API, I get the error 'No operations defined in Spec!'

But when I go to the Discover portal and search for Employee Central APIs and select Compound Employee and then click on Documentation, I see the full list of Operations

 

So, this definitely is a back-end problem. It's not copying over the operations correctly.

entry.content: I'm attending

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Application IP Server
entry.content:
Hi Javierm,

You do not need to make any changes to the 1000 users; simply adjust the DNS by creating a static record with the newly migrated server IP equivalent to the old server name.

Regards

SS

entry.title: Stock change from Quality to unrestricted after usage decision
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Greetings of the day.

I am currently trying to figure out EWM-QM Integration with Synchronous goods moment.

- After Posing Goods Receipt the inspection lot is created succesfully. I am able to record usage decision and complete the inspection process, but after that the stock type is not changing from Quality to unrestricted stock.

I tried to look for this information on other blogs but unfortunately, I am still stuck here without any resolution.

Can some expert please help.

Thank you.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Request - Effect field - configuration CBC
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition), customizing certain fields—such as the "Effect" field in the Create Maintenance Request App—is restricted compared to the Private Cloud or On-Premise versions. In the Private Cloud, you can define operational effects via the "Condition Indicator > Define Operational Effects" setting. However, this customization option isn't available in the Public Cloud environment.

In the Public Cloud, the values for the "Effect" field are predefined by SAP and cannot be directly modified or extended through standard configuration settings. This design ensures system stability and consistency across all tenants in the cloud environment.

If your organization requires additional or alternative values for the "Effect" field, consider the following approaches:

  1. Feedback to SAP: Submit a feature request or enhancement suggestion to SAP through your SAP support channel or the SAP Customer Influence portal. This allows SAP to consider your requirements in future updates.

  2. Custom Fields and Logic: Utilize the Custom Fields and Logic app to create custom fields that capture the specific information your organization needs. While this won't modify the existing "Effect" field, it enables you to add tailored fields to the maintenance request process.

entry.title: Re: shipment approval process for sales orders 銷售訂單出貨審核
entry.content: You can try by configuring delivery block. Once the shipment is reviewed, block can be manually removed by the reviewer.

entry.title: How to fill the "NoIdentificación" tag in the XML of an Electronic Invoice for Mexico in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need to fill the "NoIdentificación" tag in the XML of an Electronic Invoice for an eDocument in Mexico within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, I haven't found a specific BAdI for this. Currently, the "NoIdentificación" tag is fill with the Material Number, but it needs to be filled with the information from the "Customer Reference" field instead.

I noticed that there is a BAdI called EDOC_MX_FILL_CUSTOM_DATA to modify the electronic document XML before its generation, but we were unable to make it work. We found this in the Application Extensibility: eDocument Cockpit.

Could someone assist us in how to populate the "NoIdentificación" tag in the XML of an Electronic Invoice for an eDocument in Mexico?

I would greatly appreciate any suggestions or advice you can provide.
Many thanks!

Best regards from Colombia!

 

Additional Information:
In Custom Logic, I have the following:

YY1_MX_INVOICE_ITEM
MX_Invoice_Item

DATA lv_salesorder TYPE i_salesorder-salesorder.

SELECT SINGLE salesorder
INTO @LV_salesorder
FROM zcds_billing_flow
WHERE billing EQ @billinginfo-billingdocinfo-billingdocumentnum.

IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
ITEM-DESCRIPCION = lv_salesorder.

SELECT SINGLE MaterialByCustomer FROM i_salesdocumentitem INTO @ITEM-NO_IDENTIFICACION
WHERE SalesDocument EQ @billinginfo-billingdocinfo-billingdocumentnum
AND SalesDocumentItem EQ @billinginfo-billingdocinfo-billingdocitemnum.
ENDIF.

 

By clicking on the ShowSampleCode icon:

Sample Code

CONSTANTS no_identificacion TYPE string VALUE 'TICKET 0001'.
CONSTANTS clave_prod_serv TYPE string VALUE '01010101'.
CONSTANTS clave_unidad TYPE string VALUE 'ACT'.
CONSTANTS descripcion TYPE string VALUE 'Venta' ##NO_TEXT.
CONSTANTS cantidad TYPE string VALUE '1'.

item-no_identificacion = no_identificacion.
item-clave_prod_serv = clave_prod_serv.
item-clave_unidad = clave_unidad.
item-descripcion = descripcion.
item-cantidad = cantidad.

CLEAR item-unidad.

 

 

Thank you very much for your attention, have a great day!
Vielen Dank für Ihre Aufmerksamkeit, einen schönen Tag noch!
非常感谢您的关注，祝您有美好的一天！
¡Muchas gracias por tu atención, que tengas un feliz día!
شكرًا جزيلاً على انتباهك، أتمنى لك يومًا سعيدًا!
आपके ध्यान के लिए बहुत धन्यवाद, आपका दिन शुभ हो!
Merci beaucoup pour votre attention, passez une excellente journée !
আপনার মনোযোগের জন্য অনেক ধন্যবাদ, আপনাকে একটি সুখী দিন কামনা করি!
Muito obrigado pela sua atenção, tenha um ótimo dia!
Большое спасибо за ваше внимание, желаю вам счастливого дня!

entry.title: Re: Purchasing Assemblies from External Vendor
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, to manage a procurement process where purchasing an assembled product (e.g., a computer) requires inventory updates for both the main item and its subcomponents (e.g., monitor, keyboard, mouse), you can utilize the subcontracting procurement process. This approach allows you to handle assemblies with their components effectively.

Subcontracting Procurement Process:

  1. Material Master Data Setup:

    • Define the finished product (computer) and its components (monitor, keyboard, mouse) in the material master.

  2. Bill of Materials (BOM):

    • Create a BOM for the finished product, listing all necessary components. This structure enables the system to recognize the relationship between the main item and its subcomponents.

  3. Subcontracting Purchase Order:

    • When placing a purchase order with the vendor, specify it as a subcontracting order. This indicates that the vendor will supply the finished product, and the system will manage the components accordingly.

  4. Goods Receipt (GR):

    • Upon receiving the finished product, perform a goods receipt. The system will automatically post the stock of both the main item and its components based on the BOM.

  5. Inventory Management:

    • After the goods receipt, both the finished product and its components are available in inventory. This setup allows for separate consumption of the main item and its subcomponents as needed.

entry.title: Re: Error Connecting ABAP Cloud to SAP Business Applicati...
entry.content: The solution was to recreate the subaccount, which resolved the issue successfully.

entry.title: Re: Account requires an Assignment to CO object error in...
entry.content:
Probably your GL is created as cost element.

You need to check your configuration and specify weather this cost element give impact to cost center or profitability segment.

If it is give impact to cost center then assign cost center against to cost element or assign it to PA.

Hope it will help you.

entry.title: Actual Costing- T-code CKMLCP
entry.content:
Dear All,
When I execute the third step 'Settlement' of CKMLCP, an error message appears. The message number is ML4HDOC002, and the message content is ‘Ambiguous Currency Key for Material with Cost Est. No. XXXX’. Does anyone know what the reason for this error is? And how to solve it?
Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Create PO from PR by Process Purchase Requisitions (V2)
Re: Missing ODP_BW, ODP_SAPI, and SLT in Replication Flow...
entry.content: Please check if DMIS is installed on S4HANA- 3572475 - How to check SAP S/4HANA or DMIS component version for SAP Datasphere Replication Flow ABAP-Integration Usage. this will enable to all the missing components from Source.

entry.title: Re: Missing ODP_BW, ODP_SAPI, and SLT in Replication Flow...
entry.content:
Please check if DMIS is installed on S4HANA

- 3572475 - How to check SAP S/4HANA or DMIS component version for SAP Datasphere Replication Flow ABAP-Integration Usage.

this will enable to all the missing components from Source.

entry.title: Re: Create PO from PR by Process Purchase Requisitions (V2)
entry.content:
Hi @kaya-ya

The issue occurs because the source of supply is missing in the purchase requisition. In the app "Process Purchase Requisitions (V2)", after assigning the source of supply to the purchase requisition, you will be able to create a purchase order.

entry.title: Re: Old SO being change price to 0
entry.content: actually as i saw in the change history of my SO, the price will be change to 0 after any action. it mean my SO will be change the price to 0 if anyone made any change. not only atp

entry.title: Equal Workload distribution to HANA Scale out database servers.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

There are 8 databases in HANA 2.0 SP05 Rev 59 DB scale out environment.

I noticed a SQL query is running on the particular db server and spike up CPU /Memory more while other DB hosts are less utilized.

* How to equalize that SQL execution to all DB hosts. Please provide more details if there is a solution.

* if one DB host is spiked up, will it hang the whole DB response to application server?

Please answer.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Old SO being change price to 0
entry.content: i have already overwrite the price. but it only change to 0 amount for scale 200. now if i go to vk13 to display condition for validity period 202X the pricing will be dislay with 200$ amont no scale exist

entry.title: How the materials are getting displayed in Monitor material coverage and MD_MRP_FORCE_CLASSIC
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I am facing issue in Monitor material coverage App Where lot of materials are not getting displayed in the application. it is observed that if the the MD_MRP_FORCE_CLASSIC  has material entry with MRP apps column as G then material gets displayed in the MRP application. if it has entry with B then it does not get displayed in the MRP application.

Here as soon as the material gets created system performs the check and decides if the material can be displayed in MRP apps  not. 

If the MRP apps indicator is B then those materials are not getting displayed in the application.

My Question :

by What criteria systems decides if the materials are getting displayed in MRP apps or not? i.e. by what criteria MD_MRP_FORCE_CLASSIC sets the indicator G and B for the material.

Currently in our system many of the materials have by default Value as B which is set by system as a result lot of materials are not getting displayed in MRP Apps. 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: AdobeSign Integration with Successfactors for Recruit...
entry.content:
Hello Diana,

yes, we were able to fix the issue this was due to missing permission in SuccessFactors for the Adobe sign to attach the document and status back to SuccessFactors. Kindly check if you have granted the export and import API permissions in SF for the Adobe account user.  

We were able to successfully implement the adobe sign integrations.

Best Regards,

Jisha

entry.title: Access detail story from main story
entry.content:
Hi team,

we have created main (parent) story and detail (child) story. Detail story is setup to be opened from main story through External URL option. Both main and detail stories are in same folder. Now my requirement is user should not be able to open detail story independently. He should be able to open it from parent story only. Can this be achieved?

entry.title: Actual cost CO document
entry.content:
Dear Team,


In SAP ,there was a t code KSB5 use to view the actual cost co document .Is there any Fiori app to view in Grow with sap actual cost CO document.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Actual cost CO document
entry.content:
KSB5 is a deprecated transaction / app which has been deleted in CE 1911, kindly use the Replacement App
Display Line Items - Cost Accounting.

This is communicated and documented here on page 36 / 37:

https://help.sap.com/doc/ce01d82756b947a1a043a5d5a3204226/1911.500/en-US/WN_CE1911_EN.pdf

Apps no Longer Available as of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 1911
Deleted App 
Display Actual Cost Documents
Replacement App
Display Line Items - Cost Accounting

entry.title: No suitable purchase requisitions found - Stock Transport Order ME59N
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I am implementing the automatic creation of interplant stock transfer orders with transaction ME54N, then I will automate the generation with program RM06BB30.

When I try to extend the supplying plant in the BP tx to activate the automatic order box the system issues the following message: No vendor can be created with grouping ZCEN - Message no.: FSBP_ECC005.

Following the note 3532987 I tried to add the grouping ZCEN in the SPRO and I get the following message Entry ZCEN does not exist in T077K (check entry) Message No. 00058

The ZCEN grouping groups together the plants that are used in the stock transport orders

Please let me know how to solve the case and if you can tell me the steps for the generation of transfer orders with the tx ME59N to work.

Thanks 

Percy

entry.title: Re: Stock change from Quality to unrestricted after usage...
entry.content:
Hi Thakur,

Please check the configuration of the "Follow Up Actions for Quality Result". You must specify the value under NST "Non-dependent Stock Type". Assign the code for unrestricted stock group, example "FF for unrestricted or BB for blocked stocks".

If you configure the setting "NST" of the destination storage type, it will automatically post the stock type after confirmation of the putaway task.

Hope this helps.

 

Regards,

IM

entry.title: Re: How to create custom function module to add fields in target structure in LTMOM?

Can any expert please analyse and let me know what is the root cause of problem ( Change stock type -- Quality →unrestricted) and create a WT based on Follow up action WPT.

Thank you for your time and consideration

entry.title: How to connect On-Premise MySQL database using SAP CAPM NodeJS app?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

we have a on-premise My SQL database where the data exists and we need to  fetch data from MySQL DB and store into HANA Cloud DB using CAPM NodeJS application on interval basis liek once in a day.

I'm able to connect to On-Premise MYSQL DB in Locally installed VS Code using NodeJS but when I'm trying the same in SAP BAS then getting error like "Error connecting to MySQL: Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:3306". I have update my etc file locally but still error persists.

Also I maintained Cloud Connector configuration as below

also created a destination on top of it in BTP cockpit.

I created a function in service.js file under srv folder

const { cds } = require('@sap/cds');
const { getDestination } = require('@sap-cloud-sdk/connectivity');
const mysql = require('mysql2/promise');

module.exports = async (srv) => {
    srv.on('loadReadingsData', async (req) => {
        try {
            // Get the destination from BTP Cockpit
            const destination = await getDestination({ destinationName: 'MySQLDB' });
   
            const { URL, username, password, database } = destination.originalProperties;
   
            console.log("connecting to EnerChart DB start");
            // // Connect to the MySQL database using the details from the destination
            const connection = await mysql.createConnection({
                host: '127.0.0.1',
                port: 3306,
                // host: URL,
                user: username,
                password: password,
                database: database,
                // ssl: {
                    // ca: fs.readFileSync('/path/to/ca-cert.pem'),
                    // cert: fs.readFileSync('/path/to/client-cert.pem'),
                    // key: fs.readFileSync('/path/to/client-key.pem'),
                //     ciphers: 'TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256',
                //     rejectUnauthorized: true
                // }
            });

            // console.log("Connected to MySQL!", connection.threadId);

            // Query MySQL (example)
            // const [rows, fields] = await connection.execute('SELECT * FROM MeterReadings');
            // console.log(rows.length);

            // Close the connection
            // await connection.end();
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error connecting to MySQL:', error);
        }
    })
}
Not able to connect with URL : http:mysql:3306 so i tried with direct IP address above.
Still not able to connect to On-premise MySQL DB. Also Can anyone suggest any approach for better security like Certificates or principle propagation etc.. in both BTP & MySQL DB to implement.
 
Can anyone please help/guide me to achieve the above scenario with best practices.
Thank you in advance.
Regards,
Ramana.

entry.title: Re: February's Developer Challenge in SAP Community - Integration 🧩
entry.content:
Finally escaped the room !!!!

Thanks @ajmaradiaga for the challenge

entry.title: Re: What Is SAP Business Data Cloud? Benefits, Architecture & Use Cases
entry.content:
@Raja_Gupta , thanks for the comprehensive overview of SAP Business Data Cloud.  For further clarification, I have a few questions regarding the Foundation Service section:

Foundation Service

The Foundation Service is the backbone of SAP Business Data Cloud. It provides core capabilities for seamless data access, governance, security, and integration across different data sources.

  • When analysis is required, the bundled data from source system is replicated into the Foundation Services.
  • This data is then harmonized with other relevant business data from other business applications, transformed, and enriched to become a Data Product.
  • The data products are stored in a hyperscaler environment based on SAP HANA Cloud, Data Lake files and is ready to be used.

My questions:

  1. Is all replicated data, both from SAP and non-SAP sources, stored as files in the Foundation Service Data Lake?
  2. To make this data available in Datasphere for analysis, does it need to be replicated again into Datasphere, or will Datasphere directly access the Foundation Service Data Lake files?

entry.title: Re: Subcon Po value not matching with good receipt
entry.content: The issue seems to be due to rounding differences or valuation discrepancies in the system. SAP may calculate the price based on standard price control, moving average price, or subcontracting-related cost adjustments. Since the stock is already consumed, you may need to check the accounting documents (MR51, MB5B) and consult FI/CO teams to adjust the valuation if necessary.

entry.title: Re: Name of iOS app is not showing correctly on iOS and MacOS
entry.content: This is not my expertise, sorry. I will check with colleagues in case they can help.

entry.title: Re: Problem Statement: HTTP 403 Error in SAP CPI IFlow Wh...
entry.content: Thank you for your suggestion! I checked the HTTP Session Reuse setting in the Runtime Configuration of the Integration Flow, and it was set to NONE. After changing it to On Integration Flow, the issue was resolved successfully. Appreciate your help!

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge March - SAP Community Escape House - AI 🤖🧠
entry.content:
Wow thank you all so so much for your feedback!!

 

@mvaibhav Please click on the task where you originally received the service-key again. You will receive a new service-key. We regularly update them 🙂

entry.title: Re: ADT access to ABAP Trial
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for taking the time to look at my issue and apologies for the delay in getting back to you.

I did try your suggestion of deleting the ABAP Cloud Project,

but without any success, once I entered the ABAP Service Instance URL to create another ABAP Cloud Project, the error raised it's ugly face again.

So you got me thinking was this something to do with the containerisation of objects and why I had not experienced this issue in the past and why this issue was limited to a small sample set of users.

In the past we had to manually delete our Trial Accounts at the Account Explorer level, in essence wiping the entire slate clean. 

Lately, I've noticed once your expiry period lapses your Trial is automatically generated when you logon the next day. However, the repository objects may not necessarily have been cleaned up in a background activity, for example instance ABAP_instance_1 expires on Monday containing the package ZABAP_1. If the user logs on Tuesday and creates a new instance, ABAP_instance_2, they still can reference the package ZABAP_1 from the previous instance and work on the objects for a week or so in the new instance. Then after a spell security authorisations kick in and block the user from accessing the objects under the package ZABAP_1, thus locking the account due to corrupted references.

I was wondering if this has anything to do with the structuring of pods, but you will have a better understanding of what happens under the bonnet, but for the purpose of the discussion, I’m using AWS East Coast(VA).

 

So that’s the long winded explanation to say, yeah had to blow away the trial instance and manually rebuild instance and everything works now, just got to clone my objects again. No lazy short cuts in the future then!

entry.title: BCM return code (sy-subrc) : 5/ Exception : proxy error in mbc

Could anyone help me in finding out what causing this error, attached screenshot for your reference

 

Thanks,
Sai
Treasury & Banking (functional)

entry.title: How to understand Code Movement in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am recently enrolled into SAP BTP learning path and I found it very interesting also. I have learnt how to develop and deploy apps too. But I have one strange doubt which is confusing me to understand in a proper way. I might sound silly, but please understand me I am as a noobie. We will have separate instances in our SAP GUI System for Development, Quality & Production. After finalising code with proper unit test we will move TR from Development to => Quality to => Production through SE01 and STMS T-Codes. How we do that in BTP. One thing I observed is by using command (for CAPM) "cds deploy hana: production" code will be pushed to Production. Am I right or how should I understand this code movement concepts in BTP. 🤔🤔🤔

#btp, #SAP Cloud, SAP BTP, ABAP environment

entry.title: Long bank account number for china vendor (more than 18 digits)
entry.content:
Hi,

The business wants to enter a bank account number with more than 18 digits in the BP master data for a Chinese vendor, which the system is currently not allowing. Therefore, they have requested that if it is not possible to add more than 18 digits in the system, we should link the bank account number field to the reference details field.

Can anyone help me in knowing the process how it can be done?

Sai,
Treasury & Banking (functional)

entry.title: PB 9 , windows 7 Has anyone written code to print label with zebra printer?
entry.content:
How to convert the below code to Zebra printer? Do I need to learn ZPL programming? And make a new label with .zpl extension?

I can print a test label directly from the zebra ZDesigner GX430t printer. 

I now need to print label through the code PB9 and Windows 7.

The current code to print name and class label for Dymo printer is as below:

if NOT IsValid(dymo) then
dymo = CREATE oleobject
end if

if NOT IsValid(dymoLabel) then
dymoLabel = CREATE oleobject
end if

li_dymo_ole_connect = dymo.ConnectToNewObject("Dymo.DymoAddIn")

li_dymolabel_ole_connect = dymoLabel.ConnectToNewObject("Dymo.DymoLabels")

if IsNull(li_dymo_ole_connect) then li_dymo_ole_connect = -999

// make sure the object is valid before accessing it
if IsValid(dymo) AND IsValid(dymoLabel) then

if (li_dymo_ole_connect = 0) AND (li_dymolabel_ole_connect = 0) then

TRY

dymo.StartPrintJob();

if (tab_1.tabpage_signup.rb_barcode.Checked) then
        lb_open = dymo.Open2(GetCurrentDirectory() + "\Checkpoint_HSV5_sigps.label")

      dymoLabel.SetField("RIDER NUMBER", ls_racer_id);
     dymoLabel.SetField("RIDER NAME AND CLASS", ls_full_name);

 

thanks,

Saba

entry.title: Re: How to connect On-Premise MySQL database using SAP CA...
entry.content:
@ramana_saps4hana43 

MySQL is not supported and will not be made available for support for CAP based applications with Nodejs or Java based..

Refer List of supported and Built in Database support for CAP

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/databases

entry.title: CRM Copy Badi Service contract to Order
entry.content:
Hello All,

@crm ,@Service order

I have a requirement to copy Refobject data like equipment number serial number from service Contract to  service order using copy control.

For this we are using thr badi crm copy badi, but when the followup document button is clicked in service contract it is not stopping in the Method Refobj to copy the data to target.

Can you please help on what we are missing in this to trigger the method to enable copy functions.The standard copy function module for refobj also not triggering.

Regards

  • Niranjan

entry.title: Integrating with the Alerts System API in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
In SAP Service Cloud V2, the Alerts System API provides a seamless way to integrate alert messages into the system. This API allows businesses to send real-time alerts to users, ensuring that important notifications are displayed in the Alerts view of the application. By leveraging this API, businesses can improve customer engagement, enhance user experience, and streamline alert management processes.

Overview of the Alerts System API

The API exposes a dedicated endpoint where businesses can send alert messages using Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) or other integration methods. The alerts appear in the system in the same order they are sent, ensuring proper tracking and prioritization.

Communication System and Communication Arrangements

To enable the Alerts System API, businesses must configure the Communication System and Communication Arrangements in SAP Service Cloud V2:

  1. Communication System: Defines the external system that communicates with SAP Service Cloud V2.

      2.Communication Arrangements: Establishes the integration scenario, specifying the API services and authentication details.

Setting up these components ensures secure and seamless data exchange between systems.

Key Attributes for Alert Generation

When sending an alert, the following system-provided attributes should be used to ensure consistency and proper identification:

Attribute Description

userIdThe UUID of the logged-in user/agent.
loggedInLanguageThe language of the user’s login. Alerts can be sent in the selected language.
contextTypeAlways set to INDIVIDUAL_CUSTOMER.
contextIdThe UUID of the individual customer.
displayIdThe display ID of the individual customer.

Request Format

To send an alert to the system, use the following JSON request format:

 

{
"userId": "<< UUID of the user>>",
"loggedInLanguage": "en",
"contextType": "INDIVIDUAL_CUSTOMER",
"contextId": "<< UUID of individual customer in V2 >>",
"contextDisplayId": "12345"
}

 

Response Format

Upon successful processing of an alert request, the system returns a structured response containing the alerts and their attributes:

 

{
  "count": 2,
  "alerts": [
    {
      "signalType": "extAlert",  
      "object": {
        "objectType": "INDIVIDUAL_CUSTOMER",
        "displayId": "4501391",
        "objectId": "<< UUID of the individual customer >>"
      },
      "groupText": "High",
      "icon": "",
      "color": "",
      "message": "Fraud",
      "source": {
        "url": "<< navigation URL >>"
      }
    },
    {
      "signalType": "extAlert",  
      "object": {
        "objectType": "INDIVIDUAL_CUSTOMER",
        "displayId": "4501391",
        "objectId": "<< UUID of the individual customer >>"
      },
      "icon": "",  
      "color": "",
      "groupText": "Medium",
      "message": "Photo not approved",
      "source": {
        "url": "<< navigation URL >>"
      }
    }
  ]
}

 

Mandatory Attributes in the Response

Each alert in the response must contain the following mandatory attributes:

AttributeDescription
signalTypeDefines the type of signal returned in the response (e.g., extAlert).
objectRepresents the associated object (customer details).
messageContains the alert message text.
iconSpecifies the icon for the alert (e.g., error_filled).
colorDefines the alert color (red, yellow, or green).

How the API Works in the UI

This API call is triggered dynamically by the UI component. Each time the UI loads, it makes a real-time API request to fetch the latest alerts associated with the logged-in user. The system ensures that the most recent and relevant alerts are displayed.

Key Benefits of Using the Alerts System API

  • Real-time notifications: Keeps users informed about critical updates.

  • Enhanced customer experience: Ensures timely communication of alerts.

  • Seamless integration: Works with CPI and other integration methods.

  • Customizable alerts: Supports multilingual messages and color-coded categorization.

Conclusion

The Alerts System API in SAP Service Cloud V2 is a powerful tool for integrating alerts and enhancing real-time communication. By leveraging this API, businesses can improve operational efficiency, ensure prompt responses, and deliver a superior customer experience. Start integrating today and take full advantage of the Alerts System API capabilities!

Thanks

entry.title: CAP kafka implementation: Using Multiple topics
entry.content:
What happened?

Hello team,
we're developing a CAP application that uses BTP kafka as the message broker for async communication.
we have a query regarding that:

this is my package.json cds configuration

"cds": {
    "requires": {
        "[production]": {
            "messaging": {
                "kind": "composite-messaging",
                "routes": {
                    "kafka1": [
                        "reviews/**"
                    ],
                    "kafka2": [
                        "bookstore/**"
                    ]
                }
            },
            "kafka1": {
                "kind": "kafka",
                "topic": "my.reviews"
            },
            "kafka2": {
                "kind": "kafka",
                "topic": "my.bookstore"
            }
        }
    }
}

and here is the .js controller file

const cds = require("@sap/cds");

module.exports = cds.service.impl(async function () {
  const messaging = await cds.connect.to("messaging");
  this.on("like", async (req) => {

    //sending msg to my.reviews topic
    console.log("Sending message to my.reviews topic");
    await messaging.emit("reviews/event1", {
      message: "msg from reviews event",
    });

    // sending msg to my.bookstore topic
    console.log("Sending message to my.bookstore topic");
    await messaging.emit("bookstore/event1", {
      message: "msg from bookstore event",
    });
  });
});

acc to our configuration and CAP documentation,
the events starting with reviews should be routed to my.reviews topic and events starting with bookstore should be routed to my.bookstore.
but currently we're only receiving msgs in my.reviews topic.
what could be the reason here.

Also, could you guide me to some CAP kafka implementation that we can refer to.

Thanks

Steps to reproduce

add kafka configuration for the CAP app using the below command.
cds add kafka --for production

next, update the configuration(as above) to use multiple topics, where different events are sent to different topics based on config in package.json

Versions

kafkaSampleApp  

@cap-js/asyncapi1.0.2
@cap-js/cds-types0.2.0
@cap-js/db-service1.17.0
@cap-js/openapi1.1.1
@cap-js/sqlite1.8.0
@SAP/cds7.9.5
@SAP/cds-compiler4.9.8
@SAP/cds-dk7.9.9
@SAP/cds-dk (global)8.6.1
@SAP/cds-fiori1.3.0
@SAP/cds-foss5.0.1
@SAP/cds-mtxs1.18.3
@SAP/eslint-plugin-cds3.1.2
Node.jsv18.15.0
home/Users/I549585/Desktop/kafkaProducerApp/node_modules/@sap/cds

OS / Environment

Cloud Foundry

entry.title: Re: Unable to create delivery of return sales order in pu...
entry.content:
What are the current system status values of this item 10 ?

  • There is a FAQ on this exact subject : read 2877570 - Error BS051 while creating a Delivery from Sales Order

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Updating a source object (CDS)
entry.content:
Hi, this is not supported. The reason is overall build of the replication flow --> inbound, outbound, delta... . Need for consistency, automation, persistency, ... .

When you modify the source (the CDS in your case), you have to go to the target object (in DSP go to the target table). Add the new field in the target table manually (type, length). Then go back to the replication flow and use the 'map to existing target' function. Afterwards re-deploy the flow and run it. 

Your new field will appear and will also be populated. 

Not really easy in case you do a lot of changes -> a lot of new fields. Deleting is not in anyway 🙂

Cheers, Martin

entry.title: Re: Prevent Trasnsfer from MSEG-SGTXT to Accounting Docum...
entry.content:
You can use

  • Substitution rule as suggested by @rafaelktinoco
  • BTE Event 00001120
  • BAdI AC_DOCUMENT

entry.title: Re: ME_CUST_PO Enhancement : PO Amount Check Against PR
entry.content:
Use the provided macros to handle error message as in this answer

  • use a metafield for eban purchase requisition number
  • insure correct handling of decimals in your code (currency)

entry.title: Re: Integrating with the Alerts System API in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
Detailed and Insightful Blog, @pvsbprasad ! 👏🏻
Thanks for covering the key benefits of the Alerts API..👍🏻

entry.title: Re: Datasphere - Replication Flow
entry.content:
Hey, you can go for 500 objects in one RF. Best would be to use ODP as it will provide you out-of-the-box delta capabilities. RF is the replacement for XI/PI. 

Creating one RF for one object can be quite an overhead. additionally depends on you licenses as RF has limited usage -> check the Estimator: https://datasphere-estimator-sac-saceu10.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/

Of course, the more objects in one RF, the longer will it take for the RF to finish: 2 jobs per flow / Max 10 jobs per tenant / Each job has 5 threads. So one needs to decide. 

Additional question: what is the expectation of changes? RFs are not really setup for changes. Adding fields can be done manually, but deleting not. 

Last, but not least, RF turns off real-time. Means if you do not have ODP/ODQ, you will get changes only at scheduled times. ODP can push automatically. 

I find RFs for setup extremely easy as RF will create target tables automatically at build time and RF can stay listening if you have delta push (ODP f.e.) from the source, enabling real-time. 

One RF for module is a nice idea, but... you need to setup DSP as well. Means f.e. do you have a space for each module? InfoArea-like. 

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-datasphere-bw-odp-delta-via-replication-flow/ba-p/13739830

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-datasphere-architecture-and-security-concept/ba-p/13702030

So, overall, based on the architecture, licenses, requirements, source build, ... you design the data load. 

hope this helps 🙂

Cheers, Martin

entry.title: Re: Unable to see SAP SuccessFactors custom field in SAP...
entry.content: Hey, HCM can restrict access to specific fields based on the security rules. F.e. salary. Try those fields via standard BW Extractor. Cheers, Martin

entry.title: Re: Measures hierarchy in SAP Datasphere Analytic model
entry.content: Hey, the very same way is in BEx. Restricted measures, you can set as hidden for consumption, then use these in Calculated measures. Also variables can be used. Just try out. This topic is covered, I would say, even better then in BW. What you cannot do is exits. This has to be done in SAC. Also I did read in one SAP Blog, that SAC calculations are faster then in Analytic Model, but I still rather build my measures in the Model, then in the Story. Cheers, Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere hierarchy with directory error
entry.content:
Hey, quite some experience. With Hierarchy with Directory as well. First of all, some more details are needed :). Post some screen shots.

F.e. now you can do compounded keys, you could not previously. Do you have compounded key? 

Cheers, Martin

entry.title: Re: Date and others atribute association
entry.content: Hey, seems like compounded key. Check the source data. At first glance, I see UTF-8 code page is not applied either. I would say, you upload the data as it is. In the model-view try to separate the content with sql functions like LEFT, RIGTH, ... into own fields. Back to the SQL basics :). Cheers, Martin

entry.title: Re: ID and Description in SAP Datasphere using Business B...
entry.content:
Marcel, do not use Business Builder. Just do not :). Analytic Model is you way forward. 

But... in SAC you can try to script. IDandDescription method for the Dimension. 

I did try a while ago Business Builder, but Analytic Model is just better. Status (released, depreciated), the only functionality I found better in Business Builder, is already integrated in Data Builder .

Cheers, Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Replication Flow - Projection Functions
entry.content: Hey, I take RF as inbound layer (BW SLA++, or HANA-Live). So no modifications. Source to Target 1:1. RF will create the target table 1:1 to source. This is your inbound layer. Then you can start using basic SQL and build Re-usable Views. Cheers, Martin

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Data Flow did not import all records
entry.content:
Hi, CSV :). Was it UTF-8 code page converted? DSP has no code-page option such as InfoPackage in BW.

Does it have empty rows? Check the CSV, or best do not use CSV at all :). From security perspective CSV are a no go, even SFTP is used. 

But for Troubleshooting upload the CSV manually into the table directly in Data Builder \ Table. Just use the upload button in the table. 

Cheers, Martin

entry.title: Reference document number in Intercompany Matching Reconciliation
entry.content:
Hi Community,

How reference document number (XBLR)/assignment number (ZUONR) is generated in document?

entry.title: Re: Mails regarding failed Taskchains in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi, yes, looks like. although I did not experience this issue. 

But... why don't you schedule via script in CLI. you can check the status of the task chain, steps, build dependency (what you cannot in a task chain). Simulate BW-like behavior if-fail continue, ... 

Cheers, Martin

entry.title: Re: How to handle variables in SQL based view - Data Sphere
entry.content:
Some more ideas:)

Sub-select, parameter / variable - yes (parameter may be difficult to consume via Model / Story)

or... you do a join on the same view with the prior-record in the same entry as the current-record.

entry.title: Re: How to connect On-Premise MySQL database using SAP CA...

As NodeJS can connect to any DB to read and same I'm trying. I'll insert the data finally into HANA Cloud DB and UI on top of it for all CRUD and Analytics.

entry.title: Re: How to connect On-Premise MySQL database using SAP CA...
entry.content: thanks for altering the questions posted with provided more revised content... As I see your Destination is still not be able reachable to the cloud to get the data from your local db
